globalNews.title: Mum rescued from Venezuela rubble with newborn baby tells BBC how he helped her survive
globalNews.summary: The "miracle" rescue of 18-day-old baby Juan David is a symbol of hope in Venezuela after the devastating earthquakes.

globalNews.title: Sixth person dies after shooting at youth welfare centre in Germany
globalNews.summary: Four women and a man were shot dead at the scene while a sixth person died in hospital, police say.

globalNews.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump's appeal of E Jean Carroll's sexual abuse case
globalNews.summary: The decision means the US president will now have to pay her the $5m (£3.6m) in damages she had been awarded.

globalNews.title: DR Congo bans mass gatherings in the  capital to prevent spread of Ebola
globalNews.summary: Opposition politicians accuse the government of using the outbreak to halt a planned protest.

globalNews.title: US says it has agreed to 'stand down' after exchange of strikes with Iran
globalNews.summary: A series of strikes over the weekend saw the US and Iran accuse each other of violating the ceasefire agreement.

cryptoNews.title: BNY adds USDC minting and redemption to institutional custody platform
cryptoNews.summary: The move deepens BNY's partnership with Circle and builds on the bank's role as the primary custodian of USDC reserves.

cryptoNews.title: Can AI drain DeFi? Separating Claude Mythos hype from reality
cryptoNews.summary: Claude Mythos has raised concerns about AI-driven attacks on DeFi protocols. However, the same AI tools are also available to security teams, not just attackers.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: From Bitcoin critics to blockchain believers: The 5 biggest crypto backflips
cryptoNews.summary: If you can't beat 'em, join 'em. Here are five crypto skeptics who have reluctantly embraced the opportunity of making loads of money with blockchain.

cryptoNews.title: Strategy unveils capital framework to preserve Bitcoin exposure, pay dividends
cryptoNews.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy unveiled a capital framework allowing Bitcoin sales to fund dividends, a $2.55 billion reserve and buybacks while raising STRC payout to 12%.

aiNews.title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
aiNews.summary: TIDAL's new policy will prevent AI-generated music from making money on its service.

aiNews.title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
aiNews.summary: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.

aiNews.title: Omen AI’s plan to optimize data centers is all wet
aiNews.summary: Omen AI raised a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant and stop bacterial outbreaks in data centers.

aiNews.title: Ford rehires ‘gray beard’ engineers after AI falls short
aiNews.summary: "Mistakenly we thought that by just introducing artificial intelligence ... that would produce a high-quality product.”

aiNews.title: Why Wall Street thinks US memory maker Micron is the next Nvidia
aiNews.summary: Eager to find more public AI-related companies that may do as well as Nvidia, Wall Street investors think they've found a winner with Micron.
